Name: FCollisionImpactData
Description: Information about an overall collision, including contacts.

Variables.Name: ContactInfos
Variables.Description: all the contact points in the collision

Variables.Name: TotalNormalImpulse
Variables.Description: the total impulse applied as the two objects push against each other

Variables.Name: TotalFrictionImpulse
Variables.Description: the total counterimpulse applied of the two objects sliding against each other
